title: Get started with Windows PowerShell
summary: This learning path introduces you to Windows PowerShell and provides an overview of the product’s functionality. It explains how to open and configure Windows PowerShell, run commands, and use its built-in Help system.

sections.title: Get started with Windows PowerShell
sections.summary: This learning path introduces you to Windows PowerShell and provides an overview of the product’s functionality. It explains how to open and configure Windows PowerShell, run commands, and use its built-in Help system.

lessons.title: Understand the command syntax in Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module covers the cmdlet structure and parameters for using Windows PowerShell cmdlets. It also explains how to use tab completion and how to display About files content.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-command-syntax-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand the command syntax in Windows PowerShell

lessons.title: Find commands and Get-Help in Windows PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to find Windows PowerShell cmdlets that you can use to perform specific tasks. It also covers how to use Get-Help to retrieve detailed information about a cmdlet and its parameters.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/find-commands-get-help-windows-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Find commands and Get-Help in Windows PowerShell

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Get started with Windows PowerShell
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Get started with Windows PowerShell**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
